2829.title: **£/€30 FREE BET** When you bet £/€5
2829.body: Use promo code YSKAST. Bet €/£5, get €/£30 in free bets. T&Cs apply.
2829.promoBlurb: New Customer offer - Use promo code YSKAST. Place a min £/€5 bet on the sportsbook at odds of min EVS (2.0) and get £/€30 in free bets. Free bet rewards valid for 30 days. Only deposits via Debit Cards will qualify for this offer. T&Cs apply.
2829.terms:
Who can take part?
•	New customers only.
•	Available to residents of United Kingdom or Republic of Ireland.

How and when can I qualify?
•	Open a new account using the promo code YSKAST
•	Deposit a minimum of £/€5 using Pay by Bank, a debit card or Apple Pay.
•	Place a minimum £/€5 bet on sports.
•	Min odds EVS (2.0)
•	Qualifying bet must be settled before 23:59 (GMT) 1st of December, 2026

What can I win?
•	Your £/€30 sports free bet will be awarded after your qualifying bet has settled.

What else do I need to know?
•	Free bets as part of this offer are valid for 30 days after they have been awarded.
•	Unsettled or voided bets will not count towards this promotion.
•	Cashed Out, Partially Cashed Out and Power Price bets will not count towards the promotion. If you place a qualifying bet and subsequently use Cash Out on the bet, you will no longer be eligible for the promotion.
•	Free bet stakes are not returned with winnings.
•	Best odds guaranteed does not apply to bets placed with a free bet, or partial free bet.
•	Bets placed using free bets as the stake (in part or in full) will not qualify for this offer.
•	Sign up offers are limited to one per person, family, household address, email address, and shared computer. We reserve the right to withdraw the availability of free bet offers to any customers.
•	Deposits made with e-wallets including Skrill, Paysafe, PayPal and Neteller will NOT count towards this promotion. Only Pay by Bank, Debit Cards or Apple Pay are eligible.
•	Customers registering through this offer are not eligible for any other sign-up promotion.
•	The offer excludes the following bet types: Canadian, Goliath, Heinz, Lucky 15, Lucky 31, Lucky 63, Patent, Super Heinz, Trixie & Yankee.
Other essential stuff:
•	Paddy Power reserves the right in its discretion to exclude and/or limit the availability of the offer to certain customers.
•	The full terms and conditions of Paddypower.com also apply to this offer.

4476.terms: Look for the red 'Post' icon for races which have results available. Look for the green 'Streaming' icon for races which have race replays available. Select 'Yesterday' under any region where results are available to see the previous day's race results.
4476.title: Get Fast Results & Watch Race Replays Here
4476.body: Select any past race to see how they passed the post and watch the race
4476.promoBlurb: Get results from the UK, Ireland, South Africa and US from today or yesterday by clicking on any completed race on this page. Race replays available on all UK and Ireland races shortly after the race is run.

7263.title: Pick 3, match 3  – **700/1**
7263.body: 3 correct numbers in the Irish lotto is 700/1 without the bonus ball. T&Cs apply.
7263.promoBlurb: Paddy Power Lotto Bets Rules Apply
7263.terms:
**Paddy Power Lotto Bets Rules:**
•	By placing a lotto bet, you are betting with Paddy Power (not with the respective Lotteries). Winnings from your lotto bets will be paid by Paddy Power.
•	All lotto bets are based on the numbers that are drawn from the respective Lotteries.
•	Bonus Ball(s) will not be included in settlement of bets, unless otherwise stated.
•	The dates and times on our Website are in GMT.
•	All lotto bets for a specific draw must be placed and confirmed before the first number is drawn. If, for any reason, a bet is placed after the first number is drawn, the bet will be void and the stakes returned, regardless of whether the bet would have won or lost.
•	Should a lottery provider (e.g. Camelot) introduce an additional draw to take place immediately following another draw, bets timed and dated for that day will stand against the first draw(s) to take place.
•	All bets are valid for the draw that is the bet is placed. The bet can be viewed immediately after placing your Lotto bet or alternatively My Bets sections.
•	If a lotto draw time is re-scheduled to another time within 12 hours of the advertised time of the draw all bets on that draw will stand unless the bets placed are late.
•	If a lotto draw time is re-scheduled by more than 12 hours of the advertised time of the draw all bets on that draw will be deemed void and stakes returned.
•	
If, for any reason, Paddy Power is unable to obtain all the details necessary to settle any market for a specific draw within 48 hours, then all bets on that market will be void.

•	Lotto bets cannot be combined with other bet type, i.e. sports bets.

•	The maximum pay-out for any bet, series of bets from a single source, syndicate or customer is; Irish Lotteries £/€500,000; Uk 49’s £/€500,000; all other Lotteries £/€300,000.

•	Maximum pay-out within each Lottery will depend on the market being bet on.

•	Odds are subject to fluctuation.

17959.title: **FREE SPIN** With PP Games
17959.body: One spin per player per day. Select customers. T&Cs apply.
17959.promoBlurb: Select accounts only. Play once between 00:00 & 23:59 daily. T&Cs apply.
17959.terms:
1.	What is Paddy’s Wonder Wheel?
o	A free to play game where you’ll have the chance to win a free prize each day during the promotion period when you take a spin on Paddy’s Wonder Wheel
 
2.	Who can take part?
o	The Wonder Wheel is open to select UK&I Paddy Power customers, 18+ that haven’t been excluded from promotions
 
3.	How do I take part?
o	Login to your Paddy Power account
o	Click on the Wonder Wheel game & spin the wheel for the chance to win a prize
o	Once the wheel has stopped spinning, it will reveal whether you have won or not
o	If you get a winning spin, a prize will be awarded at random
o	Each customer can spin Paddy’s Wonder Wheel once per day during the promotion period (00:00 – 23:59 UK time)
 
4.	What can I win?
Prize 	Expiry 	Wagering 
Free Scratchcards	24 Hours 	1x 
Free Spins 	2 Hours	N/A 
Games Bonuses	24 Hours	1x
Cash	N/A	N/A
 
o	Your prize will be credited as soon as it is claimed
o	Your prize can’t be exchanged for cash or any other prize. Customers do not have a choice of prize. Prizes cannot be exchanged. 
o	Winnings from prizes are paid out as cash
o	A free prize doesn’t guarantee winnings
o	Your Free spins must be played within 2 hours of being awarded
o	Some eligible games for this game may not be available on our iOS app – but they are available on your mobile browser or desktop
o	The Wonder Wheel will reset each day at 00.00 UK time
 
5.	Daily prizes – More information
Free Spins
o	If you win Free Spins, you must accept it from the promotions page & launch an eligible game
o	If you win 5 Free Spins, the eligible games are Paddy Power Gold Book of Luck and Pirate’s Hold: Davy Locker’s Coins
o	If you win 10 Free Spins, the eligible games are Paddy Power Gold Book of Luck and Pirate’s Hold: Davy Locker’s Coins
o	Free spins are equivalent to £0.10 per spin
o	Free spins are locked to the first eligible game launched
Games Bonuses
o	If you win a Games Bonus, you must accept it from the promotions page & launch an eligible game
o	Eligible games are Sweet Bonanza, Bigger Bass Bonanza and King Kong Cashpots
o	Your Free Bonus carries a x1 wagering requirement & is available on all eligible, as detailed on the reward page along with the bonus value

Free Scratchcard
o	If you win a Free Scratchcard, you must accept it from the promotions page & launch an eligible game
o	Your Free Scratchcard is only valid on Ruby Walsh 1k Scratchcard, Footy Frenzy 2020 1k Scratchcard and Footy Frenzy 2022 1k Scratchcard.
o	Free Scratchcards are equivalent to £0.10 and have a 1x wagering requirement
Cash
o	Cash is credited instantly
 
6.	What else do I need to know?
o	Throughout the promotional period, the number of prizes offered may be increased at Paddy Power’s discretion. Paddy Power reserves the right to change the prizes at any time or withdraw or amend this game at any time and without prior notice

279379.title: **£/€10,000 JACKPOT** Have you entered?
279379.body: Select the winner of all 6 races to win the jackpot. Only one entry per game. T&Cs Apply.
279379.promoBlurb: Free to Play. Select the winner of all 6 races to win the jackpot. Only one entry per game. T&Cs Apply.
279379.terms:
Who can take part?
•	New & Existing Paddy Power Customers
How Do I Enter?
•	Find Eliminator on the Paddy Power app or website.
•	Enter by selecting the required number of horses in each round.
•	You will be given multiple selections in each race which is clearly displayed in the game.
•	If you select the winner in all the races, you will win the jackpot.
•	Where there are multiple winners in a single game, the jackpot prize will be split equally by the number of people that won. 
•	The opening and/or closing times (as applicable) for each Game will be displayed clearly on the game. The relevant meeting will also be displayed on the game. 
•	The entry closing time will always be prior to the start of the first race of the Game and all selections must be made before the start of the Game.
•	Entry to the competition is free.
•	All entries must be complete before the start of the first race which will be clearly displayed in the game. 
•	You can edit your selections for each race up until the advertised start time of that race.
•	Max one entry per game per person. 
What can I win?
•	The jackpot amount will be clearly displayed on entry of the game and across each of the race selection screens.
•	If you select the winner in each race after all races are settled, you will win the Jackpot.
•	Where there are multiple winners in a single game, the jackpot prize will be split equally by the number of people that won. 
•	There is no consolation prizes as part of ‘Eliminator’, to win you must select the winner in all required races.
When will I get my prize?
•	Prizes for a game round will be credited the following day by 11 a.m, however this may be subject to certain delays where the prize won is over £10,000 and additional customer verification may be required. 
•	Prizes are paid out in cash.
 
What else do I need to know?
Paddy Power reserves the right to suspend or disable ‘Eliminator’ at any time.




Non-Runner

If any Pick corresponds to a non-runner in any of the races then that Pick will be replaced with the SP favourite (“SP Favourite”) for the applicable race. The SP Favourite is the favourite chosen by the Timeform Racing Feed. If there are joint SP Favourites then the Pick will be replaced with the SP Favourite with the lowest racecard number.

If for any reason the information to determine the SP Favourite is not available to Paddy Power, or if Paddy Power reasonably determines that the use of the SP Favourite would not be appropriate for any reason, then the Promoter may elect to use a different mechanism to replace non-runners.

If there is a non-runner, you can come back into the game and edit your own selections prior to the advertised start time of that race. 

Dead Heat
In the event of a dead heat, the two or more horses that are officially declared the winner will be deemed winners within the game.

Field Sizes:
In the event of field sizes (the number of runners in the race) reducing, Paddy Power reserves the right to void the entire round and/or race.

Cancelled Races:
In the event of a cancelled race that had been selected for the Round. Paddy Power reserves the right to void the entire round and not award any prizes without completion of all required races. 

Winners and Entrants Verification
Paddy Power reserves the right in its sole discretion to ask for evidence to verify the age, identity and/or eligibility of an entrant at any time, and to use any channels and methods available to carry out checks of any details provided.

Paddy Power may withhold delivery of a prize until it has received satisfactory verification from the winner. Failure to provide such satisfactory verification in a timely manner may result in a delay in the delivery of the prize. Failure to provide such satisfactory verification altogether may result in forfeiture of the prize.

If the winning entrant is, for whatever reason:
1.	not able to accept a prize;
2.	not able to verify their registration information to the satisfaction of Paddy Power; or
3.	found to have breached these Terms and Conditions by  Paddy Power
then the entrant will be disqualified and the prize will be forfeited.



To ensure that the promotion is limited to one per customer, we only permit one customer to participate from each household address, IP address, email address, payment method (e.g. debit or credit card, Neteller etc) and/or shared computer (e.g. public library or workplace). We reserve the right not to award free entries to any customer.
We reserve the right to withdraw the availability of this offer to any player or group of players or to modify the terms and conditions of this promotion at any time.
The use of programs designed to automatically play the game (i.e. “bots”) are not permitted on ‘Eliminator’. Any customer found to be using such software will be excluded from the game.
We reserve the right to exclude any entrant from ‘Eliminator’ and from use of our website, and to withhold any winnings from entrants, if we believe that such entrant has breached these terms and conditions, has tried to enter by using more than one username or is otherwise engaging in any fraudulent, suspicious or illegal activity (including participation that would be in breach of the law in the entrant’s local jurisdiction), whether or not the entrant would or might have won any prize but for such activity.
Prior to paying any winnings to entrants, we may require that such entrants submit certain documentation to us to, among other things, verify their identity. The payment of any winnings is conditional on the entrant submitting such documentation to our reasonable satisfaction.

 
Other essential stuff:

•	Paddy Power reserves the right in its discretion to exclude and/or limit the availability of the offer to certain customers.
•	The full terms and conditions of Paddypower.com also apply to this offer
